steps.title: Spot the chronological shift
steps.content: The phrase “A decade earlier, however” marks a reversal from discussing her late 1970s–early 1980s period to her earlier period of folk music establishment. The text moves backward in time, and this temporal arc is the defining structural feature.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choice
steps.content: Choice B correctly names this structure: discussing a particular recording period (late 1970s–early 1980s) followed by consideration of an earlier period of her career (her folk roots). The other choices either distort what the passage discusses—A says pop influenced “Jolene” when folk did, D invents a song comparison—or mischaracterize the tone as evaluative (C claims recommendation and disappointment, neither of which is present). That matches choice B — B is correct.
